candidatePool.description: Players from the daily HR model with at least one at-bat across their previous five completed games. The page defaults to at least three at-bats across the previous two games.

dailyProfile.interpretation: Universal Day 24/6 — 3–6–9 family dominant. Countercurrent at 3. Balancing complement at 4. Patterns are documented, not guaranteed.

watchlist.summary: Alignment is not probability. Patterns are documented, not guaranteed.
Alignment is not probability. Patterns are documented, not guaranteed.

narrative.closingObservation: Patterns are documented, not guaranteed. The model records recurrence without claiming causation.
